description:
Close the missing API/tooling gaps so the LLM and human operator can manage beadwork cleanly through the extension.

Initial examples called out in review:
- support issue depth management flows
- expose missing beadwork mutations/inspections through stable slash commands and LLM tools
- avoid forcing humans or prompt logic to fall back to ad hoc shell parsing for common beadwork operations
title: Expose missing beadwork issue-management operations as commands/tools
